name: Corner World
short_description: Game where you can build, break or craft things.
detailed_description:
Step into a vibrant sandbox game where you can break blocks, build blocks, plant plants, interract with the blocks!

With over 40 blocks to build with, you can let off your creativity and design you imagine as the game limits. Grow and harvest 4 types of plants, manage your items, thrive in a 66x33 area ripe for construction. Save your progress across three save slots, and expand your gameplay with the shop to buy or sell items. Customize your character with clothing options to make your outfit.

Even players who can’t read will enjoy the game thanks to its easy-to-understand visuals and approachable gameplay mechanics. Perfect for creators of all ages, this is your chance to build the world your way!

Do not ask why your character does not have legs!
